steps.title: Use exponential properties
steps.content: Given $ f(x) = c^x $ and $ f(6) = 9 \cdot f(4) $, substitute into the equation: $$ c^6 = 9 \cdot c^4 $$ Divide both sides by $ c^4 $: $$ c^2 = 9 $$

steps.title: Solve for c
steps.content: Since $ c > 1 $, take the positive square root: $$ c = \sqrt{9} = 3 $$
